notes: Codegen C11 hardening wave in closure phase. Codegen-hardening stub retired: all 13 impl phases landed plus every W15/W16 deferred-wiring item — CastExpr routes through classifyCast to a real OpCast emission ladder; BinaryExpr Eq/Ne → OpEqScalar / OpEqCall; SpawnExpr lifts closures to `__fuse_spawn_<module>_<N>` top-level fns and emits OpSpawn; ThreadHandle.join and Chan.send/recv/close lower to the matching W16 MIR ops. New helpers in compiler/codegen: w15_emission.go (full C11 for the 17 W15 ops), w17_attrs.go (@repr / @align / @inline / @cold), w17_intrinsics.go (unreachable / likely / unlikely / assume / fence / prefetch / variadic promotions / Ptr.null / size_of / align_of / size_of_val), w17_types.go (SortTypeDecls / SanitizeIdentifier / MangleModuleName / EmitUnitErasure / EmitAggregateZeroInit / EmitUnionLayout / EmitPointerCategory), w17_debug.go (EmitLineDirective / EmitLocalName / EmitDebugInfoBlock), w17_overflow.go (Debug-panic and Release-wrap policies for Emit{Add,Sub,Mul}). compiler/cc: Options.Debug field, exported BuildCompileArgs arg builder, TestDebugFlagPassthrough across gcc/clang/msvc. driver: BuildOptions.Debug threads through to cc and prepends one #line directive per emit; fuse CLI gains --debug flag. tests/e2e: debug_breakpoint.fuse + TestDebugBreakpointInGdb (with optional interactive gdb). tests/perf: README + thresholds.json + 4-benchmark corpus (lex+parse, monomorph-heavy, tight arith, chan+spawn) with TestPerfCorpusPresent + TestPerfBaseline. tools/checkci: -perf-baseline flag validating thresholds.json schema. Makefile: `repro` target compiles hello_exit.fuse twice and diffs emitted C for byte equality. STUBS.md W17 history block appended; WC017 logged using Rule 10.2 mandated 6-field template. Eleventh full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (7b73781), implementation (7e32232), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W18 CLI and diagnostics.
